text:
miwi        2009-03-27 22:06:44 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    math                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    math/R-cran-gpclib   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  R-cran-gpclib is a general polygon clipping routines for
  R based on Alan Murta's C library.
  
  WWW:    http://www.cs.man.ac.uk/~toby/alan/software/
  
  PR:             ports/133114
  Submitted by:   Wen Heping <wenheping at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.589     +1 -0      ports/math/Makefile
  1.1       +20 -0     ports/math/R-cran-gpclib/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/math/R-cran-gpclib/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/math/R-cran-gpclib/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +46 -0     ports/math/R-cran-gpclib/pkg-plist (new)
